'''madofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakworm|oakworm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakworm|oakworm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædefeth|mædefeth]] || [[word:mædefej|mædefej]] || [[word:mædefesh|mædefesh]] || [[word:mædefe|mædefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madodofoth|madodofoth]] || [[word:madodofoj|madodofoj]] || [[word:madodofosh|madodofosh]] || [[word:madodofo|madodofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madofoth|madofoth]] || [[word:madofoj|madofoj]] || [[word:madofosh|madofosh]] || [[word:madofo|madofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madoffoth|madoffoth]] || [[word:madoffoj|madoffoj]] || [[word:madoffosh|madoffosh]] || [[word:madoffof|madoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madofotho|madofotho]] || [[word:madofojo|madofojo]] || [[word:madofosho|madofosho]] || [[word:madofoko|madofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madofoth|madofoth]] || [[word:madofoj|madofoj]] || [[word:madofosh|madofosh]] || [[word:madofo|madofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madofothol|madofothol]] || [[word:madofojol|madofojol]] || [[word:madofoshol|madofoshol]] || [[word:madofokol|madofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madofothotho|madofothotho]] || [[word:madofojojo|madofojojo]] || [[word:madofoshosho|madofoshosho]] || [[word:madofoko|madofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madofothon|madofothon]] || [[word:madofojon|madofojon]] || [[word:madofoshon|madofoshon]] || [[word:madofokon|madofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madofothoro|madofothoro]] || [[word:madofojoro|madofojoro]] || [[word:madofoshoro|madofoshoro]] || [[word:madofokoro|madofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
